cost_components_summary: No residual quantities remain on this compatibility role after explicit biological and land stock-change roles are split out.
input_basis_notes: Calibrated biological agriculture emissions moved to explicit biological or land stock-change residual roles.
emissions_boundary_notes: No direct emissions remain on this compatibility role.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit roles are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated residual role calibration layer and official Australian energy and inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical zero-quantity compatibility row; calibrated quantities are carried by explicit biological or land stock-change residual roles.
review_notes: Compatibility residual for old agriculture surfaces, not an optimisable model.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Retire once configurations and UI surfaces no longer reference agriculture residual buckets.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a zero-quantity fixed calibration demand process.
